subject: Geography
chapter: Solar Radiation, Heat Balance and Temperature

formulas.name: Specific Heat Capacity
formulas.variables: Specific Heat Capacity, Heat Energy (Q), Mass (m), Temperature Difference (ΔT)

formulas.name: Heat Balance Equation
formulas.variables: Net Radiant Flux (R), Solar Radiation (I), Evaporative Heat Loss (E), Convective Heat Loss (H)

formulas.name: Temperature Inversion
formulas.notes: When air temperature increases with height, it is called temperature inversion.
